base_transaction.description: Normalize columns, timestamps, internal account id, USD amount, transaction id, and label. Required for all downstream tables.

corridor_risk_score.description: Country corridor risk from Medium-only log-count weights; applied frozen to both splits.

weekly_internal_graph.description: Prior ISO-week internal graph degree and component size from Medium (NetworkX per week).

rolling_account_activity.description: Per-account rolling windows: 24h outbound velocity, dwell since last inbound, 7d/30d unique internal counterparties.

company_age_days_proxy.description: Days since first observed event for the account within the same data split (cumulative min timestamp).

pep_proxy_synthetic.description: Deterministic synthetic PEP-like flag from salted account hash (not real screening).

hrj_country_flag.description: Grey-list country token match on the counterparty leg country string (MVP heuristic).

account_daily.description: Daily rollup of transaction count and USD sum per account and split.
